service.description: Gate an agent's service call: classify verb, enforce scope, pin tenant, audit-log, and queue write actions for human approval per the agent's writePolicy.

service-call.name: create#moqui.adk.AdkActionLog
service-call.in-map: [ownerPartyId: ownerPartyId, configId: configId, parentConfigId: parentConfigId, adkSessionId: adkSessionId, agentPartyId: agentPartyId, toolName: toolName, serviceName: serviceName, argsJson: argsJson, verbClass: verbClass, decision: decision, reason: message, actionTime: ec.user.nowTimestamp, tokensIn: 0, tokensOut: 0, tokensTotal: 0]

service-call.name: create#moqui.adk.AdkApproval
service-call.in-map: [ownerPartyId: ownerPartyId, adkActionLogId: adkActionLogId, configId: configId, serviceName: serviceName, argsJson: argsJson, status: 'pending', requestedByUserId: ec.user.userId, requestTime: ec.user.nowTimestamp]

set.from: '🔔 Approval needed — agent "' + (cfg.agentName ?: 'Agent') + '" wants to run ' + serviceName + '\n' + argsJson + '\nApprove/Reject in ADK → Approvals (id ' + apprOut.adkApprovalId + ').'

service-call.name: AdkGovernanceServices.post#AgentChatMessage
service-call.in-map: [chatRoomId: cfg.approvalChatRoomId, ownerPartyId: ownerPartyId, agentName: cfg.agentName, content: cardText]

service.description: Attach execution result summary and token usage to an AdkActionLog row.
Approve a pending agent action and execute the stored service.

return.message: Not authorized: approval belongs to another company.

service.description: Reject a pending agent action; the stored service is never run.

return.message: Not authorized: approval belongs to another company.

if.script: org.moqui.impl.webapp.ChatEndpoint.pushToMembers( groovy.json.JsonOutput.toJson([ chatRoom : [chatRoomId: chatRoomId], fromUserId: fromUserId, content : content, ]), pushUserIds)
